nasb.text: to such an extent that they even carried the sick out into the streets and laid them on cots and pallets, so that when Peter came by at least his shadow might fall on any one of them.

esv.text: so that they even carried out the sick into the streets and laid them on cots and mats, that as Peter came by at least his shadow might fall on some of them.

cnv.text: 甚至有人把病人抬到街上，放在小床和褥子上，好讓彼得經過時，至少他的身影可以落在一些人身上。

ccb.text: 人们甚至把病人抬到街上，放在床上或垫子上，希望彼得路过时的影子可以落在病人身上。

csbs.text: 人们甚至把病人抬到大街上来，放在床榻上或垫子上，为要在彼得走过来的时候，至少他的影子可以落在一些人身上。
